_evidence: C2 (commit 646c4e9a + fix) live-smoke — provider-registry inventory sync / model-discovery against the local-rerank backend on :28417, using the BYOK-resolved user_model credential. RE-RUN after the LM-Studio-native id-shape discovery fix.
_path: GET /v1/model-registry/providers/019eb5a9-b8fb-7048-ab68-0a316e901126/models?refresh=true (gateway :3123 -> provider-registry :8208 -> listProviderInventory -> syncInventory -> adapter.ListModels(rerank_local => openaiAdapter) -> GET http://host.docker.internal:28417/v1/models)
_result: PASS — discovery returned 1 item; bge-reranker-v2-m3 discovered AND tagged canonical rerank (capability_flags.rerank=true + _capability='rerank'). Was 0 items before the fix.
_root_cause_fixed: The live local-rerank backend /v1/models shape is the LM-Studio-native id-keyed shape {"models":[{"id":"bge-reranker-v2-m3", "state":..., ...}]} — entries keyed by `id` (no `name`, no `endpoints`). Previously openaiAdapter.ListModels routed any `models` array to parseCohereModels, which keys on `name` and SKIPS id-only entries → 0 models. The OpenAI parser only fires on a top-level `data` key, absent here.
_fix: openaiAdapter.ListModels now disambiguates the `models`-keyed payload by ENTRY KEYS (isLMStudioNativeIDShape: first entry has `id` and no `name`): the id-keyed shape routes to the new parseLMStudioNativeIDModels (classifies each id via classifyOpenAIModel, mapping *rerank* -> rerank + sets the canonical boolean flag), the Cohere `name`+`endpoints` shape still routes to parseCohereModels. OpenAI `data` and LM Studio native `/api/v1/models` shapes unchanged.
_live_smoke: live smoke: rerank model discovered + tagged from :28417 backend (LM-Studio-native id shape)
